User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Biblicando app.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user, matching the Firebase Auth UID.

displayName.description: The user's display name or nickname.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

xp.description: The total experience points the user has earned.

hearts.description: The user's current number of lives (hearts).

skipsLeft.description: The number of question skips the user has left for the day.

role.description: The user's role in the system.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user account was created.

lastActiveAt.description: The timestamp when the user was last active.

LessonProgress.title: LessonProgress
LessonProgress.description: Tracks a user's progress in a specific lesson or module.

score.description: The score achieved in the lesson.

completedAt.description: The timestamp when the lesson was completed.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles and progress data.

/users/{userId}/progress/{progressId}.description: Stores the user's progress on individual lessons.
